briefdescription.para: XAxiCdma_Bd.

detaileddescription.para: Buffer descriptor, shared by hardware and software The structure of the BD is as the following, however, the user never directly accesses the fields in the BD. The following shows the fields inside a BD:
u32 NextBdPtr; u32 NextBdPtrMsb; u32 SrcAddr; u32 SrcAddrMsb; u32 DstAddr; u32 DstAddrMsb; int Length; u32 Status; u32 PhysAddr; u32 IsLite; u32 HasDRE; u32 WordLen; u32 Addrlen;

briefdescription.para: This function clears the content of the BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to be cleared

briefdescription.para: This function clones the content from the template BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to be cloned to
is the pointer to the BD to be cloned from

briefdescription.para: This function gets the next BD pointer of the BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to get the next BD ptr

simplesect.para: The next BD ptr of the BD.

briefdescription.para: This function set the Next BD ptr of a BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to set the Next BD ptr
is the valud of Next BD ptr

briefdescription.para: This function gets the completion status of the BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to get the status

simplesect.para: The status bits of the BD.

briefdescription.para: This function clears the status bits of the BD.

detaileddescription.para: The status bits include the completion bit as well as the error bits.
This is the only function that needs to be called to clear a completed BD. All other fields (except reserved words) need to be re-assigned before re-submission.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to clear the status

briefdescription.para: This function sets the source address of the BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to set the source address
is the source address of the buffer

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if buffer address set successfully
XST_INVALID_PARAM if buffer address is not aligned and hardware build has no DRE or in lite mode

briefdescription.para: This function gets the source address of the BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to get the source address

simplesect.para: The source address of the buffer that this BD describes

briefdescription.para: This function sets the destination address of the BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to set the destination address
is the destination address of the buffer

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if buffer address set successfully
XST_INVALID_PARAM if buffer address is not aligned and hardware build has no DRE or in lite mode

briefdescription.para: This function gets the destination address of the BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to get the destination address

simplesect.para: The destination address of the buffer that this BD describes

briefdescription.para: This function sets the length of the BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to set the length
is the length of the buffer

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM if invalid length: Length value out of valid range

simplesect.para: One case that will cause hardware failure is not covered here: If the start address is not at page offset 0, and the length plus the offset crosses the page boundary, this will cause slave error if the hardware is built in lite mode.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the length of the BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to get the length

simplesect.para: The length of the buffer that this BD describes

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Physical address of the BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to set the physical address
is the physical address of the BD

briefdescription.para: This function sets the is lite mode field of the BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to work on
is the value for whether hardware is in lite mode

briefdescription.para: This function sets the has DRE field of the BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to work on
is the value for whether hardware has DRE built in

briefdescription.para: This function sets the word length field of the BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to work on
is the length of word in bytes

briefdescription.para: This function sets the maximum transfer length field of the BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to work on
is the maximum transfer length in bytes

briefdescription.para: This function gets the Physical address of the BD.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to get the physical address

simplesect.para: The physical address of the BD

briefdescription.para: This function dumps the BD, it is a debug utility.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the BD to get the physical address
